generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on overseas tech? Every time we use these systems, we're handing them our national security on a silver platter. It's not just about data - it's about control. We need to wake up and demand real strategic autonomy before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
